HERO.HEADLINE: {{name}}
HERO.INTRO: Senior consultant with {{years}}+ years of experience leading complex agile transformations, SAP S/4HANA implementations, and scaled delivery programs across enterprise, public sector, and consulting.

ABOUT.HEADLINE: About Riza
ABOUT.LEAD: Founder of {{company}}. Experienced across consulting ({{accentureYears}}+ years at Accenture), public sector ({{publicYears}} years), enterprise, and start-ups.
ABOUT.PARAGRAPH_1: I help organizations deliver complex digital programs — from SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementations to cloud-native platform development. My focus is on what moves the needle: analyzing the current state honestly, planning realistically, delivering predictably, and steering with transparency.
ABOUT.PARAGRAPH_2: I operate comfortably across the full spectrum of agile scaling: SAFe, Scrum@Scale, LeSS, the Spotify Model, and hybrid approaches. But frameworks are tools — the real work is coaching people, aligning strategy with execution, and removing the friction between intent and outcome.
ABOUT.PARAGRAPH_3: Based in Germany. Native German, fluent English, advanced Turkish. Available for freelance engagements across DACH and Europe.

EXPERTISE.HEADLINE: Areas of Expertise
EXPERTISE.INTRO: Deep specialization across methods, scaling frameworks, and delivery disciplines.
EXPERTISE.AREA_1_TEXT: SAFe, Scrum@Scale, LeSS, Spotify Model. Experience running release trains with {{members}}+ team members across 5 sub-streams and {{experts}}+ subject-matter experts.
EXPERTISE.AREA_2_TEXT: End-to-end organizational change: assessment, action plans, coaching, culture, processes, roles, mindset shifts. Built and deployed a proprietary transformation framework.
EXPERTISE.AREA_3_TEXT: Greenfield implementations at Lanxess and ARD. Record to Report, Finance, Controlling, Procurement, IFRS 15/16, Embedded Analytics, ABAP integration.
EXPERTISE.AREA_4_TEXT: Multi-market, multi-broadcaster, multi-subsidiary rollouts. Ensured on-time go-live for {{broadcasters}} broadcasters (Wave 2) in the public sector on 01.01.2024.
EXPERTISE.AREA_5_TEXT: Product Strategy Framework (Vision, Mission, Roadmap, Backlog). OKR implementation and Jira integration. Innovation Funnel (Idea2Project). Portfolio prioritization.
EXPERTISE.AREA_6_TEXT: Budget responsibility, C-level reporting, stakeholder management, risk management (ROAM), PI planning, ART events, community of practice facilitation.

KEY_FIGURES.HEADLINE: By the Numbers
KEY_FIGURES.INTRO: Quantified impact across a decade-plus of delivery.

EON_ATLANTIS.ROLE: Agile Coach / SAFe Scrum Master / Agile Project Manager
EON_ATLANTIS.CONTEXT: Improving product organization and development of Automation Digital Platforms within the Cloud Native Engineering Domain.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_1: Scaled Agile set-up for three founding product teams: Automation Engineering, Automation Platform, Automation Enablement.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_2: Onboarded 7+ product teams within 18 months with full integration into the existing program landscape.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_3: Established Product Strategy Framework: Vision, Mission, Strategy, Roadmap, and Backlog.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_4: Delivered agile workshops covering backlog creation, story mapping, prioritization techniques, PO/Scrum/Kanban training, and OKR.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_5: Set up project portfolio management in Jira aligned with strategic business goals.
EON_ATLANTIS.BULLET_6: Drove continuous improvement via 1:1 interviews, assessment surveys, and actionable improvement plans.

ARD_DEINSAP.ROLE: Integration & Agile Delivery Manager / Rollout Manager / Risk Manager / Scrum Master
ARD_DEINSAP.CONTEXT: SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementation and process harmonization across German public broadcasters.
ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_1: Ensured on-time, on-quality, on-budget go-live of Wave 2 (Bayerischer Rundfunk, Deutsche Welle, Hessischer Rundfunk, Radio Bremen) on 01.01.2024.
ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_2: Implemented agile concepts: Agile Guide for change management, OKR for goal alignment, and Scaled Agile collaboration across streams.

ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_4: Led E-Procurement / Ariba cloud rollout — structuring, prioritization, delivery, and integration.
ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_5: Managed ROAM risk framework (Resolved, Owned, Accepted, Mitigated) with transparent project status radiators.
ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_6: Coordinated IT-Security, Data Privacy, and Accessibility compliance across the complex public-sector governance landscape.
ARD_DEINSAP.BULLET_7: Handed over 50+ products from development to operations with minimized technical debt.

RETHINK_INNOVATIONS.BULLET_6: Reported directly to C-level on turnover, profit, and capacity utilization.
